properties.name: hotkey.worker.enabled
properties.description: Enable standalone Worker mode for cluster-wide hot key detection.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.routing.app-name
properties.description: Application name for Worker-side report queue routing.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.routing.shard-count
properties.description: Total number of report shards (informational; consistent-hashing is preferred).

properties.name: hotkey.worker.routing.shard-index
properties.description: Shard index assigned to this Worker (informational; not used at runtime).

properties.name: hotkey.worker.messaging.report-exchange
properties.description: Name of the DirectExchange for receiving app-to-Worker report messages.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.messaging.broadcast-exchange
properties.description: Name of the FanoutExchange for broadcasting HOT/COOL decisions and heartbeats.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.sliding-window.duration-ms
properties.description: Total duration in milliseconds of the sliding window for QPS tracking.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.sliding-window.slices
properties.description: Number of time slices within the sliding window.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.threshold.hot-threshold
properties.description: Absolute QPS threshold for HOT key classification. A value of -1 disables absolute threshold.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.threshold.hot-threshold-ratio
properties.description: Ratio-based threshold for HOT key classification (fraction of total QPS).

properties.name: hotkey.worker.state-machine.confirm-duration-ms
properties.description: Duration in milliseconds a key must remain hot before emitting a HOT decision.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.state-machine.cool-duration-ms
properties.description: Duration in milliseconds a key must remain cool before emitting a COOL decision.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.state-machine.pre-cool-grace-ms
properties.description: Grace period in milliseconds in the pre-cooling state before confirming cool.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.qps-change-tolerance
properties.description: Tolerance factor for QPS change before recalculating dynamic thresholds.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.learning-period-ms
properties.description: Learning period in milliseconds for baseline QPS estimation.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.hot-threshold-ratio
properties.description: Dynamic hot threshold ratio relative to baseline QPS.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.recalculate-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between dynamic threshold recalculations.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.topk-validation.validate-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds for TopK pre-warm validation cycles.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.topk-validation.pre-warm-count
properties.description: Number of top-K entries to pre-warm validate before broadcasting HOT.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.topk-validation.pre-warm-min-appearances
properties.description: Minimum appearances in consecutive validation cycles to confirm a pre-warm HOT.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.heavy-keeper.top-k
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper top-K capacity.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.heavy-keeper.width
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper sketch width.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.heavy-keeper.depth
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper sketch depth.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.heavy-keeper.decay
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper decay factor.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.heavy-keeper.min-count
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper minimum frequency count.

properties.name: hotkey.worker.heartbeat.ping-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between Worker heartbeat (ping) broadcasts.
